summary: Auditoría y corrección del perfil repartidor — 10 fixes aplicados sobre la rama test. Incluye: cache de PDF para reabrir sin timeout, WhatsApp con adjunto PDF correcto, edición de cantidades con diálogo tap-to-edit, firma obligatoria cuando hay diferencias, validación DNI backend, routing dinámico por label en navegación, ocultación de Comisiones por flag showCommissions, placeholder firma ZPL, intent PDF en AndroidManifest, y script de verificación DB.

changes: Added _cachedPdfBase64 field for PDF caching (avoids 45s timeout on re-open)
Changed WhatsApp share from text: to subject: parameter (fixes PDF not attaching)
Added _showQuantityEditDialog method with AlertDialog + numeric TextField
Added GestureDetector on quantity number with dotted underline + pencil icon
Cache invalidation on +/- buttons and quantity edit dialog
Updated orange warning text to exact user-requested copy
Enhanced signature validation message when quantities differ
Auto-switch to signature tab when signature validation fails
Added showCommissions check for comercial Comisiones tab
Rewrote repartidor pageForIndex with label-based dynamic routing
Rewrote comercial page routing with label-based matching
Fixes index desync when Comisiones tab is hidden
Added isValidDniNie() function with Spanish DNI/NIE regex + mod-23 letter check
Added DNI validation in /uploads/signature endpoint (400 if invalid format)
Restructured signature section: DNI nested under name check
Added signature box placeholder with [FIRMADO] text
Added PDF MIME type intent query for Android 11+ share compatibility
New file: DB audit script with 8 checks (headers, lines, discrepancies, OPP, VDD, DELIVERY_STATUS)

issues_fixed.title: PDF preview times out on second open
issues_fixed.root_cause: _generateReceiptPdf made fresh API call each time, hitting 45s AsyncOperationModal timeout
issues_fixed.fix: Cache base64 PDF in _cachedPdfBase64; invalidate on quantity change

issues_fixed.title: WhatsApp opens without PDF attachment
issues_fixed.root_cause: Share.shareXFiles with text: parameter causes Android WhatsApp to ignore file
issues_fixed.fix: Use subject: instead of text:; added PDF MIME intent in AndroidManifest

issues_fixed.title: Quantity editing UX — tap center number to edit directly
issues_fixed.root_cause: Only +/- buttons existed; no way to jump to a specific quantity
issues_fixed.fix: Added _showQuantityEditDialog with numeric TextField; pencil icon; dotted underline on number

issues_fixed.title: Signature not enforced when quantities differ
issues_fixed.root_cause: Validation allowed confirm without signature even with modified quantities
issues_fixed.fix: Block confirm when any quantity differs and no signature; auto-switch to signature tab; show specific error message

issues_fixed.title: Backend accepts any DNI format
issues_fixed.root_cause: No server-side validation of DNI/NIE format
issues_fixed.fix: Added isValidDniNie() with regex + mod-23 letter verification in /uploads/signature endpoint

issues_fixed.title: Comisiones tab visible for comerciales with showCommissions=false
issues_fixed.root_cause: Condition only checked isJefe, not showCommissions flag

issues_fixed.title: Tab pages desync when Comisiones hidden
issues_fixed.root_cause: Hardcoded index→page mapping in _buildCurrentPage broke when nav items changed dynamically
issues_fixed.fix: Label-based dynamic routing: match navItems[idx].label to page widget

issues_fixed.title: ZPL ticket missing DNI and signature indicator
issues_fixed.root_cause: Only printed receptorNombre, no DNI or signature box
issues_fixed.fix: Added DNI line under name; added [FIRMADO] placeholder box

issues_fixed.title: DB audit for repartidor data integrity
issues_fixed.root_cause: No tooling to verify albaran discrepancies at scale
issues_fixed.fix: Created check_repartidor_db.js with 8 verification checks; found 20 discrepancies in 2026 data

queries_descriptions.purpose: Detect albaranes where CPC.IMPORTETOTAL differs from SUM(LAC.IMPORTEVENTA)
Get albaran header + lines for delivery detail
queries_descriptions.join: CPC→OPP via NUMEROORDENPREPARACION, VDD via CODIGOVENDEDOR

manual: Login as repartidor → verify Comisiones tab hidden when showCommissions=false
Open albaran → tap quantity number → verify edit dialog appears with current value
Modify quantity → try to confirm without signature → verify blocked with orange warning
Enter invalid DNI (e.g. '123') → verify frontend rejects; verify backend returns 400
Preview PDF → close → reopen → verify instant (no timeout)
Share via WhatsApp → verify share sheet shows PDF attachment
Print Zebra → verify DNI and [FIRMADO] appear on ticket
Hide Comisiones for comercial → verify Histórico tab still works (no index desync)
